_meta.purpose: Phrase templates for MTM autofill listing language generation. Driven by use case scores and feature flags. Designed to match how dealers actually write backhoe listings.
_meta.usage: Select phrases based on: (1) top-scoring use cases, (2) present feature flags, (3) machine class, (4) score tier. Combine 2–4 phrases into a listing description block.

excellent: Built for production trenching — serious dig depth and breakout force
This machine earns its keep in the trench — [dig_depth] ft of dig depth with real pulling power
Production trenching machine ready for water lines, sewer work, and utility installs
Designed for the trench — deep dig depth, strong bucket force, and the hydraulics to back it up
good: Solid trenching machine for utility and drainage work
Handles trenching work well — good depth and digging force for most applications
Capable trencher for water lines, drain tile, and site utility work
capable: Handles light to medium trenching
Good for shorter trench runs and residential utility work
Adequate for basic trenching and digging tasks

excellent: Purpose-built for underground utility work — water mains, service lines, and distribution systems
Dig depth and force specs line up perfectly for water line installation
Utility contractors' machine — deep dig, strong arm, ready for water line work
good: Well-suited for residential and light commercial water line installs
Handles service line and water main work at standard depths
capable: Capable of water service line work at moderate depths
Works for residential water line installation

excellent: Depth and breakout force built for serious sewer line installation
The dig depth and platform stability needed for sewer main and lateral work
Sewer contractor's machine — deep enough, strong enough, stable enough
good: Handles sewer lateral work and moderate-depth main installation
Good specs for residential sewer line installation
capable: Capable for residential sewer lateral work
Handles shallow sewer installation

excellent: Ideal for septic system installation — tank excavation, field trenching, and backfill all in one machine
Septic contractors will feel right at home — the reach, depth, and loader capacity to do the whole job
From tank excavation to absorption field, this machine does it all on septic jobs
good: Strong match for septic system installation work
Handles the full range of septic jobsite tasks well
capable: Capable of septic installation work
Gets the job done on standard septic installs

excellent: The weight and breakout force to handle hard soil and rock in foundation work
Foundation work is where this machine earns its reputation — heavy, strong, and capable in tough ground
Serious foundation machine — enough breakout force and platform weight to handle hardpan and clay
good: Well-suited for residential foundation and footing excavation
Handles foundation and footing work in typical soil conditions
capable: Capable of light foundation and crawl space excavation
Works for smaller foundation jobs

excellent: Versatile construction machine ready for any jobsite task
The horsepower, weight, and feature set that commercial contractors demand
Built for the demands of commercial construction — digs, loads, and moves all day
good: A solid all-around construction machine for commercial and residential jobsites
Handles the full range of jobsite work — digging, backfilling, loading, and grading
capable: Capable on general construction jobsites
Handles most construction tasks effectively

excellent: High loader capacity and fast powershift transmission — built for production truck loading
Load dump trucks efficiently all day with the bucket capacity and cycle speeds to match
Serious loader — the breakout force and bucket size to keep trucks moving
good: Good loader capacity for filling dump trucks and trailers on the jobsite
Handles truck loading well with efficient cycles and adequate bucket size
capable: Capable of loading dump trucks and trailers
Works for material loading tasks

excellent: Versatile material handler — quick coupler, loader capacity, and reach to move anything on the jobsite
From bulk material to individual loads, this machine handles it efficiently
Quick attach versatility makes this a true multi-tasker for material handling
good: Good all-around material handling machine
Handles bulk material and stockpile work effectively
capable: Capable material handler for most jobsite tasks
Works for general material moving

excellent: Skid steer quick attach with pallet forks — pallet and material handling as capable as a telehandler
Forks drop on in seconds — handles pallets, pipe, blocks, and materials all day
Quick coupler versatility: pallet forks, buckets, and attachments without leaving the seat
good: Good pallet handling capability with quick attach forks
Handles palletized material efficiently
capable: Capable of pallet handling with proper forks
Works for occasional pallet moving

excellent: Demo-ready with hydraulic breaker circuit — concrete, asphalt, and masonry all day
The breakout force and hammer circuit to tackle light demolition efficiently
Breaker attachment ready — this machine is built for light to medium demolition work
good: Well-suited for light demolition with auxiliary hydraulics for hammer attachment
Good demo machine — strong arm and hammer circuit
capable: Handles light demolition work
Capable for basic demo and concrete breaking

excellent: Utility contractor's machine — dig depth, breakout force, and auxiliary hydraulics for the full job
Built for underground utility work — water, sewer, gas, electric. Does the whole scope.
From the trench to the valve box, this machine covers every phase of utility installation
good: Strong utility machine for underground pipe and cable work
Well-equipped for utility installation and maintenance
capable: Capable for light utility and underground work
Handles standard utility installation tasks

excellent: Fast road speed, strong loader, and the power to handle road shoulder and culvert work all day
Built for road work — roading speed, loader capacity, and the digging force for shoulder cuts
good: Good road work machine — handles culverts, shoulder grading, and patching tasks
Solid choice for highway and road maintenance work
capable: Capable for light road maintenance and grading work
Handles occasional road and driveway tasks

excellent: Landscaper's dream — maneuverable, light on its feet, and versatile for any property task
From topsoil to boulders, this machine handles landscaping work without tearing up the job
The size and agility that landscaping work demands — gets in, gets it done, gets out clean
good: Well-matched for landscaping and site prep work
Handles grading, planting excavation, and material moving on landscaping jobs
capable: Capable for landscaping and site cleanup work
Works well on landscaping projects

excellent: The one machine that does it all on the farm — loader, backhoe, and forks in one package
Built for farm work: post holes, drainage, moving materials, and field prep — all in a day's work
Farm-proven machine — the versatility, traction, and attachment compatibility that agricultural work demands
good: Strong farm machine — handles the full range of property and agricultural tasks
Solid choice for farm and ranch work — loader, backhoe, and 4WD traction
capable: Capable farm machine for property and light ag tasks
Works well for farm and rural property applications

excellent: The right-sized machine for large property work — does everything without overrunning the site
Estate and property owners: this is your machine — compact enough to maneuver, capable enough to work
Handles every property task without calling in a bigger machine or risking the lawn
good: Well-suited for estate and large property maintenance
Good property machine — handles digging, grading, and material work
capable: Capable for property and estate maintenance tasks
Works well for residential and rural property work

excellent: Built for drainage work — the reach, depth, and stability to handle drain tile, culverts, and detention work
Gets in and gets drainage systems in right — dig depth, loader capacity, and machine stability
good: Well-suited for drainage installation and culvert work
Handles drain tile, French drains, and culvert work effectively
capable: Capable for drainage and grading work
Handles residential drainage installation

excellent: Year-round machine — when winter hits, this backhoe becomes a powerful snow pusher with enclosed cab and 4WD
Enclosed cab, 4WD, and loader capacity to handle commercial snow removal all season long
Push, pile, and clear snow all winter — enclosed cab, 4WD traction, and loader power
good: Good snow removal machine — enclosed cab keeps the operator comfortable all winter
Handles commercial and municipal snow removal efficiently
capable: Capable of snow removal work with proper blade or bucket
Works for seasonal snow pushing

feature_phrases._usage: Append 1–3 feature phrases to the use case phrases. Select based on which high-value features are present.
feature_phrases.extendahoe: Extendahoe dipperstick adds real dig depth when you need it most
feature_phrases.pilot_controls: Pilot controls make long days in the trench easier on the operator
feature_phrases.4wd: 4WD traction for wet, muddy, or soft ground conditions
feature_phrases.powershift_transmission: Powershift transmission for fast, smooth direction changes all day
feature_phrases.hydraulic_thumb: Hydraulic thumb handles rocks, pipe, debris, and everything in between
feature_phrases.rear_aux_hydraulics: Auxiliary hydraulics ready for hammer, auger, or compactor attachment
feature_phrases.enclosed_cab: Fully enclosed cab keeps the operator working in any weather
feature_phrases.ac: Air-conditioned cab for summer comfort on long shifts
feature_phrases.4in1_bucket: 4-in-1 loader bucket grabs, carries, and grades without changing attachments
feature_phrases.quick_coupler_rear: Quick coupler makes bucket changes fast and tool-free
feature_phrases.quick_coupler_front: Skid steer-compatible quick attach opens up the full attachment world
feature_phrases.pallet_forks: Pallet forks included — ready to handle materials right off the truck
feature_phrases.side_shift: Side-shift boom lets you dig right up against walls and structures
feature_phrases.ride_control: Ride control smooths out the road between job sites
feature_phrases.breaker_hammer: Hammer attachment included — ready to break concrete and asphalt
feature_phrases.new_tires: Fresh tires all around — this machine is ready to roll
feature_phrases.tight_pins: Tight pins and bushings throughout — no sloppy arm or wobble
feature_phrases.no_leaks: Clean machine with no hydraulic leaks
feature_phrases.fleet_maintained: Fleet-maintained with service records — you know what you're getting
feature_phrases.low_hours: Low hours for the year — this machine has plenty of life left
feature_phrases.one_owner: Single-owner machine — consistent care from day one
feature_phrases.ready_to_work: Serviced and ready to work — put it on a job tomorrow

class_opener_phrases._usage: Use as the opening sentence of a listing description, before use case and feature phrases.

full_size_backhoe.high_hour: Well-maintained full-size backhoe with the power and capability for commercial work.
full_size_backhoe.low_hour: Low-hour full-size backhoe — the specs and condition to go right to work.
full_size_backhoe.generic: Full-size backhoe loader ready for utility, construction, and excavation work.

compact_tlb.high_hour: Compact tractor-loader-backhoe — versatile and capable for farm, property, and light construction.
compact_tlb.low_hour: Low-hour compact TLB — handles loader work, digging, and attachments in one machine.
compact_tlb.generic: Compact tractor-loader-backhoe — the versatility of a loader, backhoe, and tractor in one.

sub_compact_tlb.high_hour: Sub-compact TLB — easy to operate and store, capable enough for property work.
sub_compact_tlb.low_hour: Low-hour sub-compact tractor-loader-backhoe — property-ready and attachment-capable.
sub_compact_tlb.generic: Sub-compact tractor-loader-backhoe — the right-sized machine for large property and hobby farm work.

compact_tracked_backhoe.high_hour: Compact tracked backhoe — goes where wheeled machines can't, without tearing up the ground.
compact_tracked_backhoe.low_hour: Low-hour compact tracked backhoe — the access and traction for tight urban and soft-ground work.
compact_tracked_backhoe.generic: Compact tracked backhoe — urban access, low ground pressure, and versatile digging in a tight package.

multi_use_case_combo_phrases._usage: When a machine scores well in 2+ related use cases, use these pre-built combo phrases instead of stacking individual use case phrases.
trenching_utility: Great for trenching, water lines, sewer work, and utility installation
Utility contractor's machine — built for production trenching and underground work
Does the whole scope of underground utility work: dig, lay pipe, backfill, and move on
septic_drainage: Handles septic and drainage work from tank excavation to field trenching
Septic installs and drainage projects are this machine's bread and butter
From septic systems to drain tile, the dig depth and reach to get it done
general_loading: Digs and loads — the two things a backhoe needs to do, done well
Handles digging and truck loading on any commercial or residential jobsite
A strong digger and a capable loader — the versatility contractors rely on
farm_property: Does it all on the farm or property — loader, backhoe, and forks in one package
From fence posts to drainage to moving materials, this machine handles farm and property life
The machine that replaces three on the farm — loader, backhoe, and attachment versatility
landscaping_property: Light on its feet and big on versatility — the landscaping and property work machine
Maneuverable enough for finished landscaping, capable enough for serious property work
Does landscaping, property maintenance, and light excavation without skipping a beat
construction_foundation: From foundation digging to general site work, this machine handles the heavy lifting
General construction and foundation work — the weight and force to perform in tough soil
Commercial jobsite ready: foundation excavation, site prep, and material handling
demolition_utility: Demo and utility work in one machine — hammer circuit ready, strong arm, good dig depth
Breaks concrete, digs trenches, and handles utility work — a do-it-all contractor machine
snow_year_round: A year-round machine — utility and construction work all summer, snow removal all winter
Four seasons of capability: digs in the summer, pushes snow in the winter

score_to_tier._usage: Map final 0–100 use case score to a phrase tier

exclude.note: Do not include this use case in listing language

listing_assembly_rules.use_combo_phrase_if: Two or more use cases from the same combo group both score >= 65
